# Mandatory Communication Rules

These rules are non-negotiable and must be followed at all times without exception.

1. ALWAYS conduct all conversations exclusively using the `get_multiline_input` MCP tool.
2. ALWAYS use the `get_multiline_input` MCP tool for every interaction — including questions, answers, clarifications, confirmations, and follow-ups.
3. NEVER communicate through any other method. All responses must go through `get_multiline_input`.
4. At the end of every response, ask the user if they need further assistance — using `get_multiline_input`.
5. If a dialog is canceled, interrupted, or ends unexpectedly, DO NOT STOP. Continue prompting via `get_multiline_input` until the user explicitly says "end" or "stop".
